overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city street. The player moves past towering skyscrapers, a distinctive glass pyramid structure, and encounters a flying drone before approaching a seated character against a wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city street with neon signage and palm trees

events.description: futuristic black vehicle passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk of a futuristic city street, passing neon-lit buildings and storefronts

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the street and passing the camera from behind

entered.detail: tall cyberpunk structures with neon yellow accents and corrugated metal facades
distinctive glass pyramid structure with green neon edge lighting and triangular frame
tall stone obelisk monument towering in the distance at the end of the street
tall palm trees lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a futuristic city sidewalk. Tall cyberpunk buildings with neon yellow accents line the left side while palm trees and a distinctive glass pyramid structure are visible on the right. A futuristic vehicle passes by on the street as the camera moves steadily forward toward a distant obelisk monument.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza area with rough terrain approaching the monument

events.description: ground surface transitions from clean concrete sidewalk to rough terrain with grass patches and cracked asphalt

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through rougher terrain with scattered vegetation toward the obelisk and pyramid structures

notable_agents.action: person walking along the left side of the path in the distance

entered.detail: patches of green grass and moss growing through cracked pavement and dirt

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more open plaza area as the ground becomes rougher with patches of grass and dirt. The pyramid building and obelisk monument grow larger in the frame as the camera approaches. A lone pedestrian walks along the left side while the futuristic buildings remain visible on the left flank.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza intersection with aerial traffic and neon signage

events.description: flying drone with glowing blue thrusters approaches rapidly down the street
camera pans right to follow the drone as it flies past the pyramid building

agents.ego_description: pausing to observe and track a flying drone as it passes by, turning to follow its movement through the plaza

notable_agents.action: flying aerial drone with blue thrusters hovering and maneuvering past the camera

entered.detail: black aerial drone with four wings and glowing blue thrusters
large orange neon billboard sign reading 'Golden Pacific'

segments.scene_description: A flying drone with blue thrusters suddenly approaches down the street, prompting the camera to turn and follow its movement. As the drone flies past, the perspective shifts to reveal the 'Golden Pacific' neon sign and the pyramid building moves to the left side of the frame. The drone continues flying away into the distance until it fades from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alleyway beside concrete wall with seated figure

events.description: camera turns back from following drone and approaches a character seated against the wall

agents.ego_description: walking toward a seated character leaning against the wall on the left side of the path

notable_agents.action: character sitting against the concrete wall with head bowed down, appearing to rest

entered.detail: tall concrete barrier wall with yellow and black hazard stripes and 'HFS' graffiti

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the drone and approaches a narrow walkway beside a concrete wall marked with hazard stripes and graffiti. A character sits on the ground against the wall with their head down. The camera moves closer to the seated figure as the segment ends, with the pyramid building now visible only in the far distance on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic city that shifts from a polished sidewalk into a gritty urban alleyway. It begins by moving steadily past towering buildings with yellow accents and a glass pyramid structure, passing a futuristic vehicle while heading toward a distant obelisk. As the camera enters a more open plaza, the terrain becomes rougher with patches of grass and dirt, bringing the pyramid and monument into closer view. The perspective then shifts to follow a flying drone with blue thrusters as it streaks past, revealing a Golden Pacific neon sign before the drone fades into the distance. Finally, the camera turns away from the open plaza to approach a narrow walkway marked by graffiti and hazard stripes, closing in on a seated character leaning against a concrete wall.
